articles.title: Alliance Wealth Advisors LLC UT Decreases Holdings in The Walt Disney Company $DIS
articles.summary: Alliance Wealth Advisors LLC UT reduced its stake in The Walt Disney Company by 24.3% in Q4 2025, selling 5,301 shares and ending the quarter with 16,530 shares valued at approximately $1.88 million. Disney's stock, currently trading around $101.29 with a market cap of $179.4 billion, recently beat quarterly earnings estimates with $1.63 EPS on $25.98 billion revenue. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with a consensus target price of $133.53 for the entertainment giant.

articles.title: Star Wars Day (May The 4th) Is Here, But The Real Test For Disney Stock Comes In Three Weeks
articles.summary: Star Wars Day on May 4th highlights the upcoming release of "The Mandalorian & Grogu" on May 22nd, Disney's first theatrical Star Wars movie since 2019. This film, along with other major releases like "Toy Story 5," "Moana," and "Avengers: Doomsday," is expected to significantly boost Disney's box office performance in 2026. While Disney may not have the single highest-grossing film, these releases are anticipated to help the company dominate the overall box office chart.
